description: One who writes or copies documents; a recorder of words. 'Kima' names who makes permanent—hand turning speech into lasting marks.
sound_symbolism: The word marks with precision. 'Ki' strikes with precise contact, mark made. 'Ma' grounds with permanent record, writing fixed.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun and verb: 'mia lo phelui kima.' (I record the words.) Preserves the words of 'weru' (poet) and 'lophae' (storyteller); pairs with 'thekiro' (write) as role to act.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Scribe as servant—recording without imposing, preserving without owning.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Scribe as preserver—the one who keeps words from being lost to time.
